title: callerya australis
intro: Callerya australis, also known as the Australian snail vine, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Callerya australis include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal preparations.
